signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No ceasefire extension, resolution, or deal has been confirmed; weekend talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, but both sides are mulling a second round of negotiations before the two-week ceasefire (announced April 7) expires early next week[1].

signals.headline: South Korea's Central Bank Holds Policy Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
South Korea's Central Bank Holds Policy Rate Steady Amid Rising Oil-Driven Inflation | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's Bank of Korea **froze its policy rate at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive time** on April 10, 2026, maintaining the benchmark seven-day repurchase rate unchanged[2]. This decision was widely anticipated, with 93% of fixed-income experts predicting the hold[2].
